metadata.description: Complete unit statistics extracted from encrypted game data

confederation_units.name: Infantry
confederation_units.description: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry

confederation_units.name: Grenadier
confederation_units.description: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery

confederation_units.name: Flame Assault
confederation_units.description: Armed with a hand flamer. Very effective against infantry. Heavy equipment reduces movement speed

confederation_units.name: AV-40 Fortress
confederation_units.description: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun

confederation_units.name: T-21 Hammer
confederation_units.description: Light tank with high speed rotating gun

confederation_units.name: T-22 Zeus
confederation_units.description: Heavy tank. Low speed, very powerful damage and wide attack range

confederation_units.name: MLRS Torrent
confederation_units.description: Multiple rocket launcher system with extra-wide attack range. Needs siege mode

rebels_units.name: Infantry
rebels_units.description: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry

rebels_units.name: Grenadier
rebels_units.description: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery

rebels_units.name: Sniper
rebels_units.description: Armed with a long-range sniper rifle. In siege mode overview and attack radius extends

rebels_units.name: Coyote
rebels_units.description: Light assault car with light armour and medium machine gun. High speed for quick attacks and scouting

rebels_units.name: Armadillo
rebels_units.description: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun

rebels_units.name: Rhino
rebels_units.description: Medium tank. High speed. Upgrade allows siege mode which increases damage and firing rate

rebels_units.name: MMC Porcupine
rebels_units.description: Mobile missile system. Armed with heavy machine gun and rocket launcher with fast reloading

mines.name: Mine Scorpio
mines.description: A personnel mine. Deals light damage to machinery

mines.name: Mine Frog
mines.description: A multi-charged mine. Jumps before detonation. Fragments and additional charges scatter

mines.name: Mine Lizard
mines.description: Anti-tank mine. Detonates only when enemy machines are nearby

confederation.name: Bio suit
confederation.effect: Health recovery for infantry increases 3 times. Requires Energy suit

confederation.name: Forced light missiles
confederation.effect: Allows you to train Flame Assaults

confederation.name: Lava flame fuel
confederation.effect: Heavy flamethrower installs on AV-40. Requires: Reinforced engine

confederation.name: Volcano flame gun
confederation.effect: Increases damage for Zeus and Hammer tanks by 25%

rebels.name: Titanium jacket
rebels.effect: Increases armour for all infantry by 1

rebels.name: First-aid kit
rebels.effect: Triples health recovery for all infantry

rebels.name: Rifle 'Hornet-10'
rebels.effect: Sniper's overview radius and fire range increases by 2, damage increases by 20%

rebels.name: Heavy machine gun
rebels.effect: Increases damage for coyotes and armadillos by 15%

rebels.name: Reinforced engine
rebels.effect: Increases speed for all machinery by 1. Allows Rhino tank
